anatomy_label: a SYNTHETIC PLACEHOLDER phantom (organ-like model, NOT a real scan)

ingestion.detail: DICOM series (96 slices) via SimpleITK. | modality=ultrasound

segmentation.detail: Otsu 3D threshold + morphology [US-tuned (closing x2, on denoised volume)] + largest of 1 components (dominant frac=1.00).

reconstruction.detail: Marching cubes on real volume mask (243299 voxels, spacing(z,y,x)=(0.6, 0.45, 0.45) mm).

meshing.detail: GLB exported: 35770 verts / 71536 faces; smoothed (Taubin x10); no decimation.

narration.detail: ANTHROPIC_API_KEY not set; used templated narration.
